arts.ttl: Why Chelsea star Wesley Fofana escaped red card vs Arsenal for Declan Rice incident
arts.sum: Chelsea star Wesley Fofana escaped a red card in the first-half of Sunday's Premier League clash with Arsenal. VAR briefly checked the incident while the Chelsea defence organised themselves for the free-kick.

arts.ttl: Arsenal really keen on 19-year-old Liverpool target they have been following for years
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the Ajax defender Jorrel Hato at the end of the season. According to a report from TBR football, Liverpool are keen on the 19-year-old full back as well, but Arsenal have been following him for two years and they are really keen on getting the deal done. The player has […] The post Arsenal really keen on 19-year-old Liverpool target they have been following for years appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'The makeshift striker steps up again!' | Merino heads Arsenal into the lead!
arts.sum: Mikel Merino gives Arsenal the lead in their Premier League clash with Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Premier League forced to release statement after Chelsea handball incident vs Arsenal
arts.sum: They said in a tweet: "The referee’s call of no penalty for handball by Cucurella was checked and confirmed by VAR – with his arm deemed to be in an expected position with no clear or deliberate action towards the ball." Chelsea defender Marc Cucurella avoided being penalised for a handball during their clash against Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to sell EIGHT to fund Club World Cup spending spree
arts.sum: Chelsea to sell EIGHT to fund Club World Cup spending spree Chelsea are getting their summer business done very early in anticipation of the Club World Cup.

arts.ttl: Arsenal plot summer move for 21-year-old wide player who rejected Barcelona
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on signing the Espanyol right back Omar El Hilali. The 21-year-old has been quite impressive in La Liga and his performances have attracted the attention of the North London club according to a report from the Sun. arts.ttl: Cole Palmer problem explained by Enzo Maresca after Arsenal vs Chelsea shock
arts.sum: The England international and Chelsea's star man was not selected for the fixture on Sunday afternoon between the Premier League pair at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Why Cole Palmer is missing from Chelsea squad against Arsenal today
arts.sum: Chelsea’s star man is not involved in this afternoon’s London derby at the Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Cole Palmer OUT of Arsenal vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea face Arsenal at the Emirates on Sunday but the Blues will be without star man Cole Palmer, as they search for a win to boost their Champions League hopes

arts.ttl: Chelsea planning to sell Axel Disasi in the summer transfer window
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea are planning to sell Axel Disasi (27) during the summer transfer window. The Premier League club have drafted a list of between 7 and 8 players…
